project.name: agent-platform
project.description: 企业级 Agent 平台 - Python 编排 + Java 核心服务

hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in services/orchestrator-python/*.py|services/orchestrator-python/**/*.py) cd services/orchestrator-python && uv run ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; uv run ruff format "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null ;; services/model-gateway-python/*.py|services/model-gateway-python/**/*.py) cd services/model-gateway-python && uv run ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; uv run ruff format "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null ;; services/knowledge-python/*.py|services/knowledge-python/**/*.py) cd services/knowledge-python && uv run ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; uv run ruff format "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null ;; esac

case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */graph/nodes/*.py) echo '⚠️ LangGraph node created - register in graph/builder.py' ;; */tools/*.py) echo '⚠️ Tool created - register in tools/__init__.py' ;; */test_*.py) echo 'ℹ️ Test file created - run: make test' ;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in contracts/proto/*.proto|contracts/proto/**/*.proto) buf lint "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo '⚠️ Proto lint issues' ;; esac
